name: Léa Rousseau
title: Data Scientist — NLP & Recommender Systems
summary: Doctorante en machine learning reconvertie en data scientist appliquée. Actuellement chez un éditeur de presse numérique parisien, je travaille sur les systèmes de recommandation et la personnalisation de contenu.

details: Built and A/B tested a content recommendation engine (collaborative filtering + NLP embeddings) that increased article engagement by 22%
Productionised models via MLflow and a FastAPI inference service on GCP
Runs weekly experiment readouts for the editorial and product teams
Worked on CTR prediction models for programmatic advertising (XGBoost, LightGBM)
Contributed to internal feature store tooling in Python

experience.role: PhD student (unfinished — left after 1.5 years to join industry)
details: Research topic: graph neural networks for drug interaction prediction

education: Master's in Machine Learning — ENS Paris-Saclay, 2020
